subject: Cannot login
message: Hello, I've been trying to login to my account since yesterday but keep getting 'invalid credentials'. I haven't changed my password. Please help.
hi how do i reset password

subject: API rate limit question
message: We are hitting the 1000 req/hour limit. We need more. What are our options?

subject: Billing discrepancy
message: Our invoice shows 50 users but we only have 42 active. Please correct and issue a credit.
This is RIDICULOUS. Your app has been down for 2 hours and I have a client presentation!

subject: Slack integration broken
message: The Slack integration stopped sending notifications 3 days ago. We've tried reconnecting but same issue.

subject: GDPR Data Request
message: Per GDPR Article 15, we request all personal data you hold about our employees. Our legal team requires this within 30 days.

subject: Feature request: Gantt chart
message: We love TeamFlow but really need a Gantt chart view for our project planning. Is this on the roadmap?

subject: Cannot import CSV
message: I'm trying to import 200 tasks from a CSV file but keep getting an error: 'Invalid format on row 45'. The file looks correct to me.
